positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical abstract depiction of 'Dreamscape.' The composition features glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna entangled with swirling cosmic dust and crystalline geometric shapes. Focus on strong, contrasting silhouettes against a deep navy and twilight purple gradient background. The main subject should be a celestial river flowing through a crystalline cavern, rendered with intricate linework, vaporwave aesthetics, and clean, scalable vector art quality. The overall mood is mystical, serene, and futuristic, suitable for high-quality screen printing on apparel. Highly detailed, minimalist yet rich.
